name: Mesa
description: The gunslinger has a steady deadly hand. Each shot deals high damage. Mesa is the fastest draw in the realm.
passiveDescription: Shoot dual-wielded sidearms |SPEED|% faster and reload single-handed sidearms |RELOAD|% more rapidly. Gain |HEALTH| Bonus Health when not using Melee Weapons.

abilities.name: Ballistic Battery
abilities.description: When activated, this power stores damage caused by guns. When triggered again, that damage is channelled through the next gunshot.

abilities.name: Shooting Gallery
abilities.description: Gives an ally Extra Damage while jamming the guns of nearby enemies. This power shifts between team members.

abilities.name: Shatter Shield
abilities.description: Envelops Mesa in a barrier of energy, reflecting back incoming bullet damage.

abilities.name: Peacemaker
abilities.description: With intense focus, Mesa draws her Regulator pistols, shooting down her foes in rapid succession.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The gunslinger has a steady deadly hand. Each shot deals high damage. Mesa is the fastest draw in the realm.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Mesa Warframe.

drops.location: Mutalist Alad V Assassinate, Rotation C

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Mesa Warframe.

drops.location: Mutalist Alad V Assassinate, Rotation C

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Mesa Warframe.

drops.location: Mutalist Alad V Assassinate, Rotation C

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Crit Chance UI indicator for Mesa’s Ballistic Bullseye Augment Mod having long decimal numbers

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed loss of functionality after getting knocked down as Mesa with her Peacemaker active. 
As a general fix, Mesa should no longer be knocked down while Peacemaker is active, as intended.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Mesa now has the ability to use Ballistic Battery during Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2
patchlogs.changes: Mesa Insomnia Skin by Goosmo

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.10 + 31.5.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with Mesa Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Mesa Mesnificent Skin by kakarrot2812

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.changes: Mesa reimaged as the Sentients would have designed her.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.changes: Nyx’s Assimilate Augment now allows you to roll, similar to Mesa’s Waltz!

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed clip issues with the Zundi Pistol Skin when used with Mesa’s Idle Animation.
Fixed a script error related to Mesa’s Shooting Gallery.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Mesa Shooting Gallery

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a softlock occuring during the Kuva Lich or Sister Vanquish/Convert choice if you had an Arch-Gun equipped or any custom animation (Mesa’s Peacemaker, etc).

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker FOV stat not showing changes from Range Mods when viewed in the Arsenal. 
Fixed Mesa being unable to double jump after activating Peacemaker right after jumping, as reported here:

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Nezha Prime: 29.3.0 + 29.3.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Mesa Prime, Akjagara Prime, and Redeemer Prime have entered the Vault!
Replaced New Loka’s Sacrifice of Mesa Prime Systems with Titania Prime Systems.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when deactivating Mesa’s Ballistic Battery ability.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.8 + 29.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed certain Warframe abilities (Mesa's Shattered Shield, Mag's Magnetize) that create reflecting bullets counting towards hits that increase the Hata-Satya Critical Chance buff. Only hits performed by Soma Prime should increase the Hata-Satya Critical Chance buff.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Fixed losing weapon functionality if Octavia had Shooting Gallery (Mesa Subsume) active and casted one of her other abilities.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed tilted position of the Telos Boltace when holstered on Mesa’s back.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Mesa: 65 to 100
Mesa Prime: 85 to 125
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker and Titania’s Razorwing deactivating Melee-only mode if it was active before those abilities were cast.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.changes: Hydroid, Limbo, Mesa, and Mirage ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals!

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemakers not firing after holding down fire while rolling with Mesa’s Waltz equipped.

patchlogs.name: Arbitrations Revisited: Hotfix 25.7.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa being unable to use abilities or melee when using the Venka after casting Peacemaker.
Fixed Mesa Immortal Skin not applying properly to Mesa Prime.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa using her primary weapon in bleedout if it was the last weapon equipped before being downed with Peacemaker active.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Hotfix 25.5.1 + 25.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed invalid colour options being shown for Mesa Prime Pistols, Wukong Prime Staff, and Wukong Samadhi Staff Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.1.2 + 25.1.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Mesa Prime can now be used in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Demolysts can no longer be disarmed by the Halikar, as they stop attacking the Conduit. This follows precedent with Demolysts already being immune to the effects of Loki's and Mesa's disarm abilities.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Significantly reduced the radial blur from Mesa’s Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Mesa Graxx Helmet Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.changes:
Removed the Mesa Immortal Skin accidentally being in the Market. If you bought it you can keep it, otherwise it will remain a Baro exclusive.
Adjusted some Melee holster positions on Mesa Prime to avoid clipping/floating.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.7.0 + 24.7.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed lens flares not properly applying the Secondary Energy color (noticeable when casting Mesa’s Ballistic Battery/Shooting Gallery).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed toggling Mesa’s Regulators on and off and instantly switching to your Melee resulting in ability to use them freely without any Energy cost or restrictions.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Mesa Kudegra Skin by malayu and Xtygian

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Mesa's Ballistic Battery not working with the Ignis. 
Fixed Mesa’s Regulators name not appearing in the HUD when ranking up.
Mesa's Peacemaker will no longer trigger Arcane Velocity. Arcane Velocity can still be triggered outside of Peacemaker and will apply if Peacemaker is used during its duration.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.11
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed blurry FX for Clients when casting Mesa’s Shooting Gallery ability.
Fixed Mesa’s Shooting Gallery ability Energy color always appearing red.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.9 + 24.2.9.1
patchlogs.changes: Further improvements towards Mesa Prime’s rear weight to fix collapsing when crouching.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.changes:
Added missing offsets for Mesa Presidio on some Armor sets so that when the Skin is equipped on Mesa Prime, the proper offsets are used.
Adjusted the texture weight of Mesa’s rear area to avoid collapsing. 
Further improvements towards Mesa Prime’s Attachments when enabled on TennoGen Skins, equipping Emblems, and overall texture issues.
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker weapon damage not showing correctly in the Simulacrum.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Upgrade screen breaking for Garuda's Talons and Mesa's Regulators if you click the Mods button and back out.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes: The ‘Toggle Prime Details’ has been added back to Mesa Prime! The team has made improvements towards the blending of both Mesa TennoGen Skins and her Prime Details.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa’s Shooting Gallery ability applying to Operators damage output. 
Fixed inability to see Mesa/Mesa Prime’s Regulators on other players in the Dojo/Relay.
Fixed inability to see Mesa/Mesa Prime’s Regulators in the Simulacrum Arsenal as a Client. 
Fixed Mesa Prime’s lower cloth clipping through her legs.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.3
patchlogs.changes:
Fortuna: Mesa Prime 
Replaced the Profit-Taker Phase 4 Vaulted Relic reward with a Mesa Prime Relic.
Removed the ‘Prime Toggle’ for Mesa Prime and her TennoGen Skins due to an overly aggressive and not-so-glamorous overlap of her Prime accessories.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Mesa Prime's Shatter Shield being too bright in some levels.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.2
patchlogs.changes:
Fortuna: Mesa Prime 
Check out Mesa Prime Access for the newest golden Prime Accessories and more: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: The Profit-Taker - Update 24.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Mesa’s Shooting Gallery ability.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Pax Seeker activating on Warframe Exalted Ability Weapons (i.e. Titania Razorwing, Mesa Regulators).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to roll with Mesa Waltz.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to roll while in Mesa’s Peacemaker without the Mesa Waltz Augment equipped.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.5
patchlogs.changes: Vigorous Swap will now deactivate when an Ability weapon is active (Mesa’s Peacemaker, Valkyr’s Hysteria, etc).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Shatter Shield and Chroma’s Cold Elemental Ward not damaging certain enemies.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Shatter Shield not functioning properly.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting Mesa's Peacemaker Ability unintentionally refreshing the Arca Scisco buff, but not actually increasing the Critical Chance. Casting Mesa's Peacemaker Ability should not activate/refresh the Arca Scisco buff .

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed ability to unintentionally equip Hydraulic Crosshairs and Sharpened Bullets on Mesa’s Regulators. Although the buff appeared to trigger, it never actually applied due to the "on aim" criteria not being fulfilled (unless you had a very specific loadout with the Mesa Waltz Augment equipped).

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous situations (casting Harrow’s Thurible, casting Mesa’s Peacemaker, etc) deactivating ‘Toggle Sprint’.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa Regulator upgrades being applied twice for Clients.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes:
Mesa’s Regulators 
If you own or purchase the Mesa Presidio Skin, you will automatically receive the  Presidio Regulators skin to equip onto Mesa’s Regulators.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes: Mesa Marlet Skin by Cheshire and prosetisen

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Clients possibly getting stuck with Mesa’s Peacemaker active if they fall into a pit.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.18.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to roll while using Mesa's Waltz Augment with a controller.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed Mesa's Ballistic Battery ability's interaction with Beam weapons to behave like other weapon types: the Damage bonus is now only applied to one Damage hit, but it is not affected by the Beam weapon ramp-up and always applies full Damage.
Fixed a script error when Mesa’s Peacemaker is cast by NPCS (Specters).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.10.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa Deluxe Glyph Loc.
Fixed missing ankle buckle on Mesa Presidio.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Tenno! This Update brings you yet another Mainline! You may recall from the end of 2017 what that means... it could be a bit bumpy! We're standing by to fix any issues. The major reason for this mainline is that we've done a massive Code audit that touched almost 3000 different core engine files to better optimize Warframe. While this Update brings you some new fashion frame options for Mesa and 3 new Augments, the majority of this Update is focused on bringing fixes and Quality of Life changes. If that's not what you're after, we've got lots of great stuff coming very soon. The Plains are going to get a lot more dangerous at night in an upcoming Update.....

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa's Regulators not receiving pistol upgrades for missions where you start in Archwing (Uranus). 
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker guns remaining visible after using Peacemaker if the user is equipped with the Mesa Devil Ranger skin. 
Fixed remote players hearing 3 shot sounds instead of 2 per Mesa Peacemaker fire.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed multiple attachments clipping on Mesa.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.3.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Day of The Dead Igaro Syandana and Synoid Syandana not attaching properly when the Mesa Devil Ranger Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Mesa Devil Ranger Skin by Mz-3

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker disabling custom reticles for Snipers/Knell/etc.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed trying to use Mesa’s Waltz Peacemaker Conclave Augment causing you to get locked out of doing anything until Energy runs out or you die in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa continuing to wall run if wall running when Peacemaker is activated as seen here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/6qw45a/turns_out_mesa_can_be_a_bit_more_mobile_while/

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.2.0 + 21.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker jamming if the Shift key is held while activating the ability. 
Fixed being able to get permanently stuck switching weapons when spamming Mesa’s Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker not acquiring new targets if it fails to find a target within a short period of time after firing.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed low FPS affecting Mesa’s Peacemaker damage per second. 
Fixed the TennoCon 2017 Syandana bunching up when equipped on Mesa.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Mesa’s Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed muzzle flashes going off while reviving as Mesa.
Fixed issues with colour correction not being applied to Mesa's Peacemaker. 
Fixed arm twitching when holding a Rifle with Mesa’s Noble Idle equipped.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker screen blur remaining active after the ability ends.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to walk around in Mesa’s Peacemaker by opening the Power Menu.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Captura input filters conflicting with Warframe Abilities input filters (for ex. you could not use Mesa's Peacemaker and then toggle the camera, now you can!).

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Tweaked Mesa’s Noble Rifle animation to remove a pop in the movement.
Removed damage bonus from Mesa's Shooting Gallery in Conclave.
Mesa’s Peacemaker can no longer be activated while airborne. This ability no longer requires a target to fire, and costs 5 Energy per missed shot. Reduced channeling cost when ability is active.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with the Spectre versions of Mesa and Chroma seen in their respective Quests not properly holstering their weapons.
Fixed an issue with Telos Boltace appearing incorrectly when equipped on Mesa.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.13.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the camera shake on Mesa’s Peacemaker when firing.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.changes: Mesa’s Peacemaker ability now ignores all invulnerable enemies.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed  Mesa’s Peacemaker ability not applying camera shake when firing.
Fixed Mesa Specter’s not being able to cast Shatter Shield.
Fixed the Patient Zero quest Mesa Specter holding a random purple object.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Synthesis Scanner counting as ‘next shot’ or ‘next hit’ for the purpose of some Warframe Abilities/Passives (Volt’s Static Passive, Mesa’s Ballistic Battery, etc).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.11.0+19.11.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Mesa Graxx Helmet having blurry textures. 
Fixed incorrect Nyx Saikou and the Mesa Graxx icons.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa's Peacemaker not cooperating with ‘Weapon Only’ Sorties.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed certain enemies being accessible in the Simulacrum (Chroma, Infested Mesa, etc) and secret-Codex entries being visible for certain enemies.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa Specters casting Peacemaker infinitely following your position.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.6.0 + 19.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Mesa Longhorn helmet missing it’s dangly additions as per:

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the health boost from Mesa's Passive in Conclave

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.3.2 + 19.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa's Shooting Gallery not functioning.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Adjusted the positioning for the Daedalus Spurs to prevent clipping on Mesa.
Removed Mesa's no Melee Health buff Passive from Conclave.
Increased Secondary weapon reload speed of Mesa’s Passive in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.
Energy can no longer be picked up when Mesa’s Ballistic Battery ability is active.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2.1 + U2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Pistol Amp Aura Mod not amping Mesa’s Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: Increased the percentage of damage stored per hit in Mesa’s Ballistic Battery in Conclave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Ballistic Battery at rank 0 being able to absorb up to 200 damage per shot when it was meant to be 20.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.1
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the TennoGen Mesa Falcon Helmet tint.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed meshes getting distorted when Field of View was increased (either deliberately or from effects like Volt Speed or Mesa Peacemaker).

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 11
patchlogs.changes:
Adjusted holster positioning of Mesa’s Peacemaker so it's more centered on her arms.
Reduced Mesa's passive health bonus with no melee equipped to 25 from 30 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Mesa
Increased damage of Mesa’s Peacemaker in Conclave.
Fire rate Pistol mods will now affect Mesa's Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes Mesa’s Peacemaker effects sticking around permanently in rare situations.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: Multishot Secondary Mods are now properly inherited with Mesa’s Peacemaker. For added clarity, only non-weapon specific Secondary Mods scale with Peacemaker. We are still reviewing this for results to see if it needs scaling back in terms of sheer damage output. Please note that Regulators base damage was reduced in 18.13.1 to compensate for Multishot inheriting damage potential.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Mesa’s cape turning blue and sticking to her face when casting Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Mesa and Hydroid are now playable in Conclave.
Mesa’s Waltz 
Mesa Peacemaker Conclave Augment 
Mesa’s Shooting Gallery will no longer jam or stun boss-type enemies.
Mesa’s Muzzle Flash Augment will no longer blind boss-type enemies.
Fixed Mesa’s Specter / Infested Mesa not being able to cast Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Mesa's Peacemaker target range ring was barely visible.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa Specters being able to use Peacemaker while moving, allowing them to indefinitely shoot everything.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the required Codex scans for the Arcane Machine, Arcane Boiler, Cascade Bomb, Darvo, and Infested Mesa to one.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the blur effect from Mesa’s Peacemaker still showing when the player has entered a bleedout state.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a possible loss of functionality when spamming the activation of Mesa's Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa's Peacemaker now showing correct aiming UI for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Mesa’s Peacemaker now roots Mesa in place while creating a focus ring on the HUD.Pressing Fire will have Mesa automatically attack all enemies inside the ring, and each enemy slain will decrease the radius of the ring while increasing Mesa’s damage dealt.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed kills earned by Mesa’s Peacemaker not properly counting as kills for the player.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.11.5
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted audio FX on Mesa’s Peacemaker shots.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.8.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Mesa: Staggering Shield: Reflected bullets have a 50% chance to stumble enemies.
Fixed Mesa’s Regulator pistols appearing when previewing other Warframes.
Fixed Mesa’s Regulator pistols not being holstered when viewed in the Archwing Arsenal.
Fixed bullet deflection effects not playing on Mesa’s Shatter Shield.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ember’s Fireball Frenzy Augment causing Fireballs to bounce off of Mesa’s Shatter Shield.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.fixes:
The Amaru Chroma Helmet and Ovis Mesa Helmet are now available in the marketplace!
Fixed Mesa’s Longhorn helmet not properly reflecting energy color.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed typo in Mesa’s Longhorn Helmet blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an error that would occur when using Mesa’s Shatter Shield to deflect Panthera blades.
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker not playing its firing sounds correctly.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.16 + Tactical Alert!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed hip and syandana collision on Mesa.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa Spectres getting stuck in Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.12.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Mesa’s kills with Peacemaker not accounting properly as kills from the Warframe. This should rectify issues with suit XP not being earned at full value.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed scale and placement of Targis Prime armor when used on Mesa and Zephyr.
Fixed visual issues with Targis Prime armor when used during Mesa’s Peacemaker.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Made small tweaks to Mesa’s Peacemaker pistol draw / holster animations.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Regulator Pistols persisting on non-Mesa Warframes when switching loadouts in Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed unique case of Mesa’s Regulator pistols still being usable after Peacemaker ends.
Fixed screen never returning from blackout after using Mesa’s Peacemaker while falling into a pit.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.6.0
patchlogs.changes:
Updated Mesa’s Longhorn helmet icon in Marketplace.
Mesa’s Regulator pistols will now need to be holstered before her Peacemaker Ability is considered to be finished / deactivated.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa’s Shooting Gallery buffing enemy players in Dark Sector PvP.
Fixed players becoming stuck in Mesa’s Peacemaker after repeated use of the Ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.9
patchlogs.changes: Mesa’s Peacemaker will now automatically target enemies that enter her range when holding down the trigger button.  Ramp up time will not reset when all nearby enemies are killed.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa’s Regulator pistols not being removed upon deactivation if the player has no other weapons (e.g. stolen by Beastmaster).
Fixed Mesa becoming stuck in Peacemaker while being mind controlled by Mutalist Alad V.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.8
patchlogs.changes:
Players can no longer gain energy while in Nyx’s Absorb or Mesa’s Peacemaker.
Made various audio tweaks to Mesa’s Regulator pistols, in addition to some visual tweaks to Peacemaker’s effects.
Fixed Daedelus Shoulder Plates not attaching to Mesa properly.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.7+15.5.7.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker displaying ‘Invalid Target’ where there are no enemies nearby to fire at.
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker not applying camera shake effect when firing.
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker shooting toward player crosshair instead of directly at enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mesa’s Ballistic Battery effects showing as being used when activating the ability.
Fixed Mesa’s Shooting Gallery buff animation pathing incorrectly when standing near a wall.
Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker, Nyx’s Psychic Bolts, and Limbo’s Cataclysm affecting enemies that are immune to Tenno abilities.
Fixed an issue where Mesa’s Alt Helmet was given, for free, to anyone who crafted the frame or purchased her independently. Helmets acquired this way are no longer in inventories.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: * Fixed some sound problems with Mesa’s Ballistic Battery and Shooting Gallery

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed leveling up and Power Strength Mods making Mesa’s Shatter Shield damage reduction less effective.
Fixed placement of Dendra Armor on Mesa.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker costing zero energy to use, in addition to power allowing players to still move during bleedout.

patchlogs.name: Mesa Update
patchlogs.changes:
Obtain Mesa through defeating Mutalist Alad V!
Longhorn Mesa Alt Helmet can be found in the Market today!
